exec_dontrun.description: Make \dontrun{} example code executable ({r} blocks) (default: false)

quarto_code_blocks.description: Use Quarto {r} code blocks instead of plain r blocks (auto-set based on format if not specified)

cache_dir.description: Cache directory for pkgdown.yml files (default: system temp directory)

enabled.description: Enable external package link resolution (default: true)

fallback_url.description:
Fallback URL pattern for packages without pkgdown sites.
Use {package} and {topic} as placeholders.
(default: "https://rdrr.io/pkg/{package}/man/{topic}.html")

lib_paths.description: R library paths to search for external packages

unresolved_url.description:
URL pattern for unresolved links. Use {topic} as placeholder for the topic name.
(default: "https://rdrr.io/r/base/{topic}.html")

arguments_table.description: Table format for Arguments section: "grid" (Pandoc grid table) or "pipe" (default: "grid")

format.description: Output format: "qmd" (Quarto Markdown), "md" (standard Markdown), or "rmd" (R Markdown)

frontmatter.description: Add YAML frontmatter with title (default: true)

include_internal.description:
Include topics with \keyword{internal} (default: false)
By default, internal topics are skipped (matching pkgdown behavior).
